mypaintr 0.0.1
  • Reference
    • Hand Demo
    • Introduction to mypaintr

Hand-drawn geometry settings

Source: R/hands.R
hand.Rd

Hand-drawn geometry settings

Usage

hand(
  seed = NULL,
  bow = 0.015,
  wobble = 0.006,
  multi_stroke = 1L,
  width_jitter = 0.08,
  endpoint_jitter = 0
)

Arguments

seed

Optional random seed used for repeatable geometry.

bow

Typical bowing of long strokes as a proportion of segment length.

wobble

Low-frequency path wobble as a proportion of segment length.

multi_stroke

Number of overdrawn strokes to use.

width_jitter

Relative variation in line width between overdrawn strokes.

endpoint_jitter

Relative endpoint jitter as a proportion of segment length.

Value

An object describing how rough geometry should be generated.

Examples

hand()
#> $seed
#> NULL
#> 
#> $bow
#> [1] 0.015
#> 
#> $wobble
#> [1] 0.006
#> 
#> $multi_stroke
#> [1] 1
#> 
#> $width_jitter
#> [1] 0.08
#> 
#> $endpoint_jitter
#> [1] 0
#> 
#> attr(,"class")
#> [1] "mypaintr_hand"
hand(seed = 1, bow = 0.02, wobble = 0.01)
#> $seed
#> [1] 1
#> 
#> $bow
#> [1] 0.02
#> 
#> $wobble
#> [1] 0.01
#> 
#> $multi_stroke
#> [1] 1
#> 
#> $width_jitter
#> [1] 0.08
#> 
#> $endpoint_jitter
#> [1] 0
#> 
#> attr(,"class")
#> [1] "mypaintr_hand"
